programme.desc: Peter and his friends are sick of forgetting the million-dollar business ideas they come up with while drinking, so they strap on Joe's police body cams to record their every move.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Disney's the Reboot
programme.desc: In a special meta episode of 'Family Guy,' the network decides that it's time to explore some unique ways to reboot the series. When three versions of the reboots are shown to a focus group, the feedback takes some surprising turns.

programme.title: Family Guy: Cat Fight
programme.desc: When Quagmire opens a cat café in town, Brian decides to take a stand to get the café shut down. Meanwhile, when Meg and Brian get in trouble at school, Lois becomes nervous and decides they need to go to church camp in order to find their way.

programme.title: Family Guy: Peter and Lois' Wedding
programme.desc: The Wi-Fi goes out in the Griffin house, leaving the family with nothing to do for the evening. In order to keep the family entertained, Peter and Lois decide to tell the kids the story of how they met and fell in love in the '90s.

programme.title: Family Guy: Heart Burn
programme.desc: In celebration of Peter and Lois' anniversary, the Griffins recount their own versions of three well-known love stories.

programme.title: Family Guy: Shanksgiving
programme.desc: When Lois hosts a special Thanksgiving dinner for her family, Peter decides the best way to avoid it is to get arrested. Meanwhile, a secret that Stewie has been keeping from everyone is revealed.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Up
programme.desc: A documentary filmmaker offers an inside look at his work chronicling the growth and development of some of Springfield's finest. Marge puts her photojournalism dream on hold in order to support Homer as he tries out odd jobs in search of success.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yokel Chords
programme.desc: When Lisa protests denying education to Cletus's children, Principal Skinner offers her a chance to tutor the kids herself. Lisa's plans to help are diverted when Krusty spots the kids during their field trip and decides to use them as a musical act.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rome-Old and Julie-Eh
programme.desc: When Homer incorrectly files for bankruptcy, the court appoints an accountant for him. Grampa and Selma fall in love and move in together, and Homer and Patty plot to break up their love connection.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerazzi
programme.desc: Marge is inspired to purchase a fireproof safe to protect the family's most precious valuables after a candle on Homer's birthday cake sets fire to his party hat. A freak accident causes the safe to explode, forcing Marge to restage the family's photos.

programme.title: The Middle: Hungry Games
programme.desc: Excited and hungry over receiving a squatter's coupon at an all-you-can-eat buffet, the Hecks head off to church with the intent of hitting the restaurant immediately after the service.

programme.title: Movie: Divergent
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, a young woman who doesn't fit into any one faction of society finds her life threatened when she learns of a conspiracy to do away with her kind.

programme.title: Movie: Insurgent
programme.desc: In the wake of the uprising, Tris Prior finds herself on the run, along with Four, as they flee the leaders of the Erudite faction. They search for answers as they try to figure out what it was that Tris' loved ones sacrificed their lives to protect.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Bones: The Daredevil in the Mold
programme.desc: A BMX rider's remains are discovered on the roof of a warehouse after a failed attempt to complete a bike stunt. Meanwhile, Sweets turns to Booth for advice about proposing to Daisy.

programme.title: Bones: The Bikini in the Soup
programme.desc: When the liquefied remains of a wedding planner are found in her home tanning bed on Valentine's Day, Cam pressures her team to solve the case in time for her to celebrate the holiday with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Bones: The Killer in the Crosshairs
programme.desc: After notoriously murdering The Gravedigger, sniper-on-the-loose Jacob Broadsky strikes again. This time, his victim is a prior suspect who escaped the justice system. Booth must use his own military training to beat the sniper at his own game.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Arrow: City of Blood
programme.desc: After Slade threatens to take everything Oliver loves away, Oliver decides the fastest way to stop further bloodshed is to surrender to his enemy.

programme.title: Arrow: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Oliver rallies his team as Slade's soldiers attack the city. Felicity gets a call from S.T.A.R. Labs with game-changing news, and Thea comes face-to-face with her father.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Sebastian receives a plea for help from his high school friend after her business partner is killed at the Crescent City Gaming Convention. Also, a FBI special agent believes Adrian is a hacker the Cyber Crimes division has been tracking for years.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder leads the team to a family-owned night club where Pride's mother used to perform weekly. Also, Lasalle must urgently return home to Alabama after receiving an unexpected call from his family.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: A New Dawn
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer who was in town to help a refugee family being recruited by terrorists. Also, Wade works on the special election campaign for Mayor Zahra Taylor that takes place during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: NOLA Confidential
programme.desc: After the NCIS team uncovers a link between a drug ring and the New Orleans Police Department, Lasalle must investigate his former partner in the Vice unit. Also, Pride worries about Rita's safety as she looks into illegal activity in Clearwater.

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel

programme.title: Movie: Wonder Woman

programme.desc: As government agents continue to track him down, Jason Bourne searches for his identity by going back to where his journey all began.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: The 1000th Show
programme.desc: The station manager wants to throw a publicity rally to celebrate Frasier's 1000th show. This soon escalates into 'Frasier Crane Day,' leaving Niles very jealous. There is just one problem: Frasier can't seem to get there in time.

programme.title: Frasier: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: Roz gets an offer for a free cruise if Frasier agrees to make a celebrity appearance.

programme.title: Frasier: My Fair Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier has a relationship with a well-known attorney. All is well until his family point out that Frasier is playing out the role of the submissive female in the relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Desperately Seeking Closure
programme.desc: Samantha dumps Frasier, who then becomes obsessed with finding out why she suddenly chose to end their relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Perspectives on Christmas
programme.desc: Martin, Daphne, Niles and Roz recount their stories of a stressful Christmas period, including Martin being in a Christmas pageant, Daphne thinking Martin is dying and Frasier telling Roz's mother she is pregnant.

programme.title: Frasier: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: Frasier is bored with his regular routine so Daphne invites him to her British pub. Daphne quickly feels he is invading her turf and so a darts match is arranged to decide who gets to keep visiting the pub.

programme.title: Frasier: Ain't Nobody's Business If 'I Do'
programme.desc: Daphne finds an engagement ring in Martin's drawer, leading to the possibility of Sherry becoming Frasier and Niles' new mother. This revelation sends Frasier and Niles on a quest into Sherry's background.

programme.title: Frasier: The Zoo Story
programme.desc: When it's time to re-negotiate his contract at the station, Frasier decides to replace Bebe with a do-gooder, Ben. But Ben's idea of naming a crane at the zoo goes horribly awry, causing Frasier to question his ethics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia
programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stand by Your Man
programme.desc: Blanche meets a man at the library and only after they make a date does she realize he's in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Rose wants to keep one of the puppies from Dreyfuss's litter despite Blanche's feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: Blanche's gay brother Clayton, makes a visit to Miami with a surprise, he has found the right person to make a commitment to, but Blanche still can't get over Clayton's sexual orientation.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: Movie: Mix Up in the Mediterranean
programme.desc: A small-town cook impersonates his estranged big city chef twin to compete in a culinary contest in Malta and falls for the woman in charge of the event, who thinks he is gay.

programme.title: Movie: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A woman inherits a house in Vail, where she meets a man and gets a much-needed break.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira endeavour to secure an investor for a new motel, while Alexis and Ted struggle with long-distance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Maid of Honour
programme.desc: Moira shares the newly released Crows movie trailer with the Jazzagals. Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Premiere
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the 'Crows' movie and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet. David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Wingman
programme.desc: Alexis and Moira deal with the outcome of a viral video, while Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Moira Rosé
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard, while Johnny attempts to have 'the talk' with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Presidential Suite
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira spend a night at the Presidential Suite in the new motel, while Alexis receives a surprise visitor.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Hasan Minhaj Does Parenting
programme.desc: Hasan Minhaj teaches Phoebe parenting basics like changing diapers and taking family portraits, and Michelle Buteau, Jamie Lee and Baron Vaughn weigh in on whether Phoebe should have kids.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Ashley Graham Does Rollerblading
programme.desc: Supermodel Ashley Graham teaches Phoebe the basics of rollerblading before the two take on a half-pipe.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Mifflin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a side trip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: In the series finale, Lt. Tao is stuck in a room with a potential bomb. Provenza finally identifies the real Ms. Bechtal, and Major Crimes comes face-to-face for the very last time with Phillip Stroh.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reloaded
programme.desc: There is little time for adjustment for the newly appointed head of Major Crimes, when the department is rushing to reach a plea regarding a string of grocery store robberies that turns fatal. Meanwhile, Raydor takes a big step to protect Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Before and After
programme.desc: The division works to obtain justice in a brutal homicide, but it turns out to be more complicated than expected. Raydor struggles to gain the respect of her colleagues and to keep supervising Rusty 24/7.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Medical Causes
programme.desc: The facts are blurry in a case involving a fatal car crash in a nightclub. Rusy has to face the harsh reality when Raydor tracks down his mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Ecstasy and the Agony
programme.desc: A homicide case involves the Israeli mob and a self-proclaimed 'intuitive life strategist.' In a rare display of vulnerability, Provenza opens up to a suspect. Meanwhile, Rusty's first day of school doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: In a case involving a kidnapping-turned-homicide, the squad is pressured to work quickly. Meanwhile, DNA evidence proves that Rusty has a close tie to the justice system.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: When a fatal shooting occurs in gang territory, Capt. Raynor makes a bold move that could jeopardize her career. Rusty claims that he doesn't care to meet his biological father.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Lessons
programme.desc: A college girl goes against her mother's warnings and runs away to marry her professor. She slowly learns he is a controlling man with a shady past and she may not be able to leave him without dire consequences.

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Teacher
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers her teacher is seducing her boyfriend, events turn deadly after the teacher tries to cover it up.

programme.title: Movie: A Deadly Affair
programme.desc: A woman tracks her husband to a home he had been renovating when she suspects him of having an affair, but instead discovers his dead body.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by a Stranger
programme.desc: A woman falls in love with a man who is secretly being targeted for murder by his ex after he broke her heart and her bank account.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill
programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: No More Mr. Ice Guys
programme.desc: On this ice season Judgement Day, Shawn pushes himself and his equipment to the edge. Kris and the Kellys rise from the ashes of an engine shack fire. Vernon pitches his operation to a big time investor.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Winter Take All
programme.desc: As the miners rush to solid ground before the ice vanishes, Mr. Gold outlasts the fleet to secure TOMCOD. Kris assembles a makeshift operation. Emily rolls the dice on one last dive and Vernon hightails it to land on dangerous ice.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Let There Be Gold
programme.desc: With bonus features and added scenes: Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra help Dave troubleshoot a faulty hopper. A local old-timer points Dave to gold-rich ground.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down
programme.desc: To help boost production, Dave gives gold room operator Jesse Goins the opportunity he's been waiting for, to become a first-time rock truck driver. But all work stops when the crew faces a sudden and unimaginable tragedy.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Goldslingers
programme.desc: With new claims up for grabs, old faces return to Nome's wild west as Mr. Gold launches his biggest season. Kris' Elim plan hits a hiccup. Vernon hustles to assemble his dream team. Emily searches for her own claim. Zeke attempts an ambitious creation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Epic Fails
programme.desc: To strike it rich gold miners risk it all and when it goes wrong it can result in an epic fail: flipped rock trucks, a burning washplant, sunken excavators and more.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: About Time
programme.desc: From a cursed clock in Prague to a death-defying rescue in the snowy Sierra Nevada Mountains, Josh Gates explores six legendary locations that have withstood the test of time.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Freight Train vs. Semi, Helicopter Crash
programme.desc: A 118-car freight train smashes into a semi-truck. A four-story building collapses. A helicopter crashes on a mountaintop. Spectacular motorcycle stunt ends badly, and a house carried off in a flood crashes into a bridge.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: The Next Generation Fisherman Hilary Martin hit the Coosa River
programme.desc: Scott and Hilary Martin search for spotted bass on Coosa River.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Controlled Fire, Car Chase
programme.desc: A fire explodes and disaster comes from a police chase.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: The Smartest Snook
programme.desc: Florida's Indian River Lagoon is one of the few places to catch trophy snook, and Captain Peter Deeks has spent his career chasing them. The SFTV crew spends a few days running from Melbourne to Jupiter in search of giants.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Jet Crash, Hijacked Airliner
programme.desc: A pilot survives a pair of spectacular jet crashes, a deadly crane collapse, a volcano threatens a town in Hawaii and the dramatic rescue of passengers fleeing a plane crash in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Peter Travels to Louisiana Targeting Yellowfin Tuna
programme.desc: Peter targets yellowfin tuna in Louisiana.

programme.title: The RVers: 2.05
programme.desc: Topics are RV with friends, RV electrical, and towing 101.

programme.title: How It's Made: Moon Landing
programme.desc: We celebrate the anniversary of the Moon Landing by counting down some of the most essential items to get a person on the moon.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Bi-planes; bottom rolling hangar doors; bush planes; flight simulators.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Splashdown Crew-1
programme.desc: Follow live coverage of SpaceX and NASA Crew-1 as the first Dragon capsule returns to earth in a watery splashdown, marking the end of a five-month mission on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Goldslingers
programme.desc: With new claims up for grabs, old faces return to Nome's wild west as Mr. Gold launches his biggest season. Kris' Elim plan hits a hiccup. Vernon hustles to assemble his dream team. Emily searches for her own claim. Zeke attempts an ambitious creation.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Emotions and Commotions
programme.desc: The Snowdens welcome a new girlfriend! The Merrifields scout wedding venues with Roberta, leaving Dannielle to feel like a third wheel. The Clarks work on their relationship with explosive results. The Winders' family members question their lifestyle.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Sharing Is Caring
programme.desc: Roberta makes a shocking confession to Dannielle. The Joneses navigate dating during the pandemic. The Clarks try to make sense of everything that happened with Kaleh. The Snowdens continue to get to know Tayler and wonder if she might be the one.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Got To Be Real
programme.desc: Sister wife Roberta gives Garrick an ultimatum. The Snowdens make a big decision about their potential sister wife, Tayler. The Joneses prefer to meet people in person but set up an online dating profile to try something new. Sophie Winder is in labour.

programme.desc: Robyn questions why Christine said the family 'hates' her when they all gather. Mariah and Audrey look at wedding venues, and they say that anyone who disapproves of their same-sex marriage isn't invited. Then, COVID-19 fears sweep the country.

programme.title: Movie: Renegades
programme.desc: In 1995 Sarajevo, a team of belligerent Navy SEALS hatch a plan to steal lost Nazi gold at the bottom of a Bosnian lake. In order to get the gold they have to go deep behind enemy lines, all while evading a deadly hit squad sent to end their team.

programme.title: Movie: Red 2
programme.desc: A team of retired C.I.A operatives reunite in an attempt to track down a nuclear device that has gone missing.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Movie: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two disgraced New York City detectives seize an opportunity to step into the limelight. However, things do not go as planned for the duo as they investigate a shady capitalist.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Back in the Day

programme.desc: Find out what happens when a reporter gets busted ordering at a drive-thru on live TV.

programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Cinco De Mayo with a menu full of dishes inspired by Mexican drinks. Sunny Anderson cooks up Michelada Steak Tacos with Cerveza Pico, and then Jeff Mauro and Geoffrey Zakarian share two new ways to top tacos.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Feast on Fire
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates an entire Italian feast over coals on the grill, starting with fettuccine with smoked tomato sauce. His wife, Liz, mixes up creamy ricotta, lemon and herbs for stuffed squash blossoms, and they finish with lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Hotter and Hotter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond turns up the heat in the ranch kitchen with some seriously spicy eats. She transforms jalapeno pimento cheese dip into a fiery grilled cheese, gives roasted chipotle fish tacos a real kick and makes hot and cheesy baked meatballs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Just For Kicks

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spice It Up!

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Michael's Favorites

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Dogs in Prison
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania prison offers to take twenty dogs from Villalobos. An emaciated pit bull fights for its life. A potential adopter travels from Michigan to meet a dog that stole her heart, but then is shocked when she comes face to face.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free
programme.desc: Tania struggles to rescue a puppy that is hiding underneath a shed. A potential adopter comes to Villalobos hoping to find a companion for her dog, and she's only interested in seeing hounds. A beloved employee learns that he's finally off parole.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: VRC's favorite parolee gets arrested. A couple comes to Villalobos hoping to find a friend for their bulldog. Mariah and Spencer rescue a dog left behind at an abandoned home, only to find out that she's suffering from severe injuries.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Rescued From War
programme.desc: Tia takes in a pit bull that was rescued from terrible conditions in Kuwait. An adopter travels from Michigan in hopes of finding a new best friend. When a stray dog ends up at Villalobos, Earl is determined to track down its owner.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Storm on the Horizon
programme.desc: With hurricane season approaching, Tia prepares for the worst. Then, Tia uncovers a clue that may help Mariah and the twins track down a Katrina dog's owner. And Villalobos employee Rico steps up to the plate when his grandparents adopt a shy dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Danger Ahead
programme.desc: When Kenani is in a serious motorcycle accident, Tia and the Villalobos crew must band together to ensure him a speedy recovery. A retired Marine visits the center to find a forever fur-friend, while Lizzy and Earl rescue a hound found in a parking lot.

programme.desc: After winning big on a scratcher, a California single mom is ready to leave her mobile home, job and old life behind for a new start in Las Vegas.

programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: How It's Made: Commercial Drones, Aquarium Fish, Runway Cleaners, and Shuttlecocks
programme.desc: Featured: commercial drones; aquarium fish; runway cleaners; shuttlecocks.

programme.title: Apollo: The Forgotten Films
programme.desc: The story of the 1969 moon landing with never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Kensington Strangler

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Unholy Affair

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at the Mall: The Michelle Martinko Case
programme.desc: How a young woman stabbed to death helped solve her own murder nearly 40 years later.

programme.title: See No Evil: Headlights and Fire
programme.desc: In Pierce County, Washington, a woman's body is found set on fire beside a dead-end road. Detectives struggle to identify their victim, until cameras lead to a shocking discovery at the woman's home and put them on the trail of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at the Mall: The Michelle Martinko Case
programme.desc: How a young woman stabbed to death helped solve her own murder nearly 40 years later.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Said I Killed My Brother
programme.desc: Eric Nance expects his sister Belinda to find and destroy his murder weapon to protect him. When she finally locates it, Belinda is torn between family loyalty and doing what she knows is right. Her choice will either shield him from police or betray him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: A woman is murdered the same night she's supposed to go out with rising star, Ashton Kutcher. Police believe the clues point to a serial killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: It Won't End Well
programme.desc: A young woman's strange encounter with a man outside her home becomes the thread that unravels a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: True Conviction: A True Psychopath
programme.desc: The unspeakably gruesome murders of an elderly couple rock the town of Davis, California. Police examine the victims' bizarre injuries to determine if this is the random work of a sadistic psychopath or the premeditated plot of an unhinged family member.

programme.title: Web of Lies: I See You
programme.desc: A masked predator is harassing high school girls in New Hampshire and will not stop until they meet his demands. His victims don't know one another, but somehow their tormenter knows them all. Police race to unmask him before it's too late.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Age, Sex, Location
programme.desc: 13 year-old Kacie Woody meets two male friends via the internet – Scott, from Atlanta; and Dave, a surfing enthusiast from California. But one of these boys is not what he seems, as Kacie's innocent online contacts turn to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: David Harden is a clean-cut businessman living a double life as a burglar. His drug habit forces him to commit more daring crimes until he gets caught. He runs to Costa Rica, pulling scams until a friend turns him in.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Prey on Tourists
programme.desc: Patsy Jones was the leader of a band of thieves, targeting tourists leaving the Miami airport by robbing and carjacking them at gunpoint. When she murders one of her targets, Jones hides out in an abandoned apartment.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes
programme.desc: William Alderman and his girlfriend broke into vacation homes and used her 3-year-old daughter to help carry out the crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Prey on Tourists
programme.desc: Patsy Jones was the leader of a band of thieves, targeting tourists leaving the Miami airport by robbing and carjacking them at gunpoint. When she murders one of her targets, Jones hides out in an abandoned apartment.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: David Harden is a clean-cut businessman living a double life as a burglar. His drug habit forces him to commit more daring crimes until he gets caught. He runs to Costa Rica, pulling scams until a friend turns him in.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Coffeehouse Owners Seek Home With Short Commute
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take clients Kimberly and Blake Batson on a tour through three houses in Waco, Texas. The young newlyweds run the 'Common Grounds' coffee shop and are looking for a home close to their business.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Fran Drescher's Cancer Schmancer
programme.desc: Four vegan competitors will battle to be part of Cancer Schmancer.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Miss America
programme.desc: The Miss America Pageant is making its triumphant return to Atlantic City, and four talented cupcake bakers vie for the chance to have their cupcakes at the centre of the action.

programme.title: Chopped: Keep on Trucking
programme.desc: Four chefs with connections to the booming truck-food business motor into the Chopped Kitchen. The first basket with two assertively flavoured meats makes for a challenging appetizer round.

programme.title: Chopped: Brunch Boxes
programme.desc: In this Chopped competition, the baskets are all packed with ingredients you might find on a sophisticated brunch menu.

programme.title: Chopped: Pesto Chango
programme.desc: The chefs must work their magic in the appetizer round using pesto sauce and chicken. Then in the entree round, a second basket of beautiful ingredients, including spirulina chips, challenges the chefs to get creative.

programme.title: Chopped: Short Order Cooks

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Street Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Out of the Ashes

programme.desc: When Mandy devises a plan for partnering, Sig must rethink his own hard-won tactics. On the Time Bandit, John and Josh conspire to outmaneuver a Russian captain who tells them what to do in US waters. All hell breaks loose as two vessels collide.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Return to the Big Island
programme.desc: A year after finding his father's fishing charts, Josh and Casey return to Hawaii to grow their fledgling fishing business. Finding an industry in ruin, they join with business partner, Jeff Silva, to devise a strategy to navigate the waters ahead.

programme.title: Friends: The One Hundredth

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Kips
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler make up stories so they can spend the weekend in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda

programme.title: Full House: Mad Money
programme.desc: Jesse earns money impersonating Elvis Presley and Joey attempts to pay Danny back.

programme.title: Full House: D.J. Tanner's Day Off
programme.desc: D.J. convinces Joey she is sick so she can skip school and see her favorite rock star.

programme.title: Full House: Cutting It Close

programme.title: Full House: It's Not My Job

programme.title: Full House: D.J.'s Very First Horse
programme.desc: The Tanners are in for a wild ride when D.J. gets a horse but must hide it from her dad.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Chaperone/ Employee of the Month

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Sporix Unleashed
programme.desc: Ollie carries out a plan to catch Sporix without his teammates’ knowledge. When monsters take advantage of his idea, Ollie realizes the benefit of working as a team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 2

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/Squid's on a Bus

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bowling for Brandi
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon are excited to return to West Covina as it is a hidden honeypot for the duo. While it's off the beaten path, Jarrod and Brandi decide to follow Darrell's lead into the Inland Empire. Plus, Ivy searches for low level merchandise.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hestered in the Highlands
programme.desc: The buyers head to the hills of Murietta for an auction that has tensions and prices running high. Dave angers Darrell so much that it leads to the Gambler doing something drastic. Ivy uses brains over brawn to score a locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Boogaloo
programme.desc: The buyers welcome Rene and Casey back to the auctions with a healthy dose of badgering and competition. Dave heats things up and finds a piece of board game history. Darrell and Brandon show their moves outside of the auctions.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buys and Dolls
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mayor of Margarita-ville
programme.desc: Rene bids heavy on a huge locker in search of quality merchandise, while Mary targets the lower end hoping for a longshot score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Middle-Aged Mutant Ninja Buyers
programme.desc: The buyers head to an auction in Westminster, where the units sell for thousands. Jarrod and Brandi are hoping for quick and easy, but the high prices are no bargain. Ivy goes on a buying spree.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The World Accordion to Ivy
programme.desc: Ivy tries to lighten the mood under the hot sun, while Rene simply heats thing up with his bankroll and attitude.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Showdown
programme.desc: An auction in Los Angeles brings more buyers than Dan and Laura bargained for. Dave Hester returns to the auctions despite his troublesome past. Ivy tries to keep the peace, but gets dragged into an abnormal auction when Rene's father joins in.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auctions Away!
programme.desc: The desert town of Palm Springs has the buyers chasing treasure across the Southern California desert.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Dreams of Cookies and Cream
programme.desc: Ivy and Rene both get massive lockers packed with goods, but only one will hit a massive pay day.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Wet the Sheets?
programme.desc: Ivy tries to hit a high pay-off with a low buy-in, while Darrell and Brandon limp into a locker that may leave them all wet.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bits and Pizzas
programme.desc: Rene sniffs out a great locker, Kenny fires up his profits and Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Let's Make a Dill!
programme.desc: Brandi and her buddy set the wayback machine and discover a roaring good time, while Darrell makes the most of the little he's got. Kenny fills his pastime while courting an unfamiliar pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santanas Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: Tensions flare when Brandi and Jarrod end up at the same auction. Meanwhile, Ivy has to teach Ivy Jr. so he can get his footing and take over the family business.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mirro, Mirro, on the Floor
programme.desc: Dan and Laura hope for better units and better buyers in Santa Ana, while Rene tries to capitalize on warehouse sales. Jarrod finally buys the locker he wants and treats himself to a spa day.

programme.title: WWE's Most Wanted Treasures: Mick Foley
programme.desc: Tasked by Triple H and Stephanie McMahon, Mick Foley launches WWE's mission to reclaim iconic lost memorabilia starting with his own in-ring career. Items on the wish list include Mr. Socko and his 'Cactus Jack' flannel vest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, and Alex convince Eric to finally trade in his Minivan. Plus, the boys rock some Shock Collar Magic, Wes throws axes, and we introduce The Great Ramsini.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which Joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins His Vacation
programme.desc: Adam Conover and his girlfriend take a journey across America, where he reveals that Mount Rushmore was built on stolen Native American land, Vegas slot machines are purposely designed to be addicting, and a whole lot more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: Featuring a guy who gets crunched on his own homemade waterslide, skiers with bad ideas, bikers with worse ideas and a very nasty nurse to make the wounds worse.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrill Seekers 10
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkies are featured from roof jumps to hot-air balloon weddings.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrill Seekers 11

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Weekend Plans

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
