programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh, Filled and Fried
programme.desc: Guy crosses the country looking for scratch cooking done right, including fried empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Finds
programme.desc: Guy discovers some hidden gems like a fish shack that flies in the fish, and a volunteer-run brunch spot where kids do the cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taking a tasty tour through Tuscany, Italy. In Montecatini Alto, a hillside seafood spot serves up a squid ink specialty and a Mediterranean prawn-artichoke mash up.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Chowfest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's filling up on winner winner chicken dinners. In Baltimore, the local landmark dishes out wicked wings alongside a steak wrap. In Eugene, Oregon, a soul food joint has BBQ chicken on top of their signature burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Peru
programme.desc: On this trip Guy digs into killer grub like Michigan-made pizza pie and Philly sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried and Smoked
programme.desc: Sometimes it's not what you're cooking but how you're cooking it. Outside San Antonio, Guy Fieri checks in on the O.G. Triple D, and she's blowin' his mind with her new fried food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed south of the border to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. On the town's main drag, the taco joint that's turning out totally fresh octopus tacos and Guadalajaran-inspired sauces that'll knock your socks off.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Called It
programme.desc: Guy visits an old diner in Kentucky for fresh bread and Oyster Po' Boy.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Knockout Dishes
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister make a hearty Italian feast to refuel after a sisterly sparring session at the boxing gym. On the menu: penne with spicy sausage sauce, garlic bread, and orange and almond biscotti for dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Concert With Friends
programme.desc: Trisha treats her amazing backup singers to a night out and a picnic-friendly menu of spicy black eyed pea salad, jerk chicken with tropical chutney, spiced plantain chip with mint garlic sauce and mango lime spritzers before a surprise John Legend show.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Taco Tuesday, SoCal-Style
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves the idea of Taco Tuesday, with its easy prep and infinite combinations of tastes and textures. She's putting together her own taco-centric spread with plenty of toppings and side dishes for a fast and tasty weeknight meal special.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: No Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is heating up her Cinco de Mayo celebration with spicy dishes inspired by rare Hatch chilies from her brother's hot pepper garden.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Healthy 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Over an evening walk, Ree plans some fast and healthy meals. She's dreaming of a heavenly hummus wrap, flavorful ginger steak salad, a gorgeous grilled nectarine salad and a spicy cauliflower stir-fry.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Working Calves at Tim's
programme.desc: The family is helping out at Ladd's brother's farm, and Ree is packing a cowboy-approved lunch. There's spicy baby back ribs, twice baked potato casserole, and slow cooked jalapeno corn.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranch-Style Tex Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's cooking up fabulous ranch-style Tex Mex. There's cheese enchiladas for her father-in-law and his team of fence-fixers, and individual pina colada tres leches cakes for a prairie picnic.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 4 Ways with Beef
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is beefing things up with four recipes that feature meat. She makes a mashup of steak with creamed greens pasta, uses ground beef in taco tomatoes, wraps up mini beef wellingtons and tucks meatballs into a crispy Italian wrap.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Cinco de Mayo ... Brunch Club Style
programme.desc: It's Cinco de Mayo, and Molly Yeh is celebrating brunch club style with swirly and moist Mexican chocolate babka, spicy chorizo breakfast burrito bowls, avocado salad and frozen horchata lattes that drink just like dessert-y rice pudding.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: Molly is hosting a Mexican themed brunch for the spicy senoritas of the grand forks brunch club.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Heating Up with Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is a huge fan of husband and wife singer-songwriters Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires. True to southern hospitality, Trisha invites them over for a delicious meal with an added kick.

programme.title: The Kitchen: The Kitchen's Essentials
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are sharing essential dishes and pro tips for every home cook. Recipes include classic shrimp scampi and chocolate croissant bread pudding. Plus, Chef Cliff Crooks stops by to help the hosts tackle some common cooking do's and don'ts.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: I Will Be Great ... Tomorrow
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks draws on his expertise to help three chefs in need. The chef and co-owner of a soul food restaurant in Albany, NY, needs to branch out from her mom's recipes, and two chefs need Cliff's help finding their passion for food again.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Memorable Moms
programme.desc: Guy is travelling the nation celebrating all things mom, from recipes handed down through generations to restaurants where you feel like you're part of the family.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Truckapalooza
programme.desc: Guy's pulling up to some of the tastiest food trucks on DDD. From burgers in Key West, Fla., to chilaquiles in California, tacos in Hawaii to fresh catches in Canada, these mobile kitchens are running the gamut of grub-on-the-go.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: West Side Story
programme.desc: Walden gets an invitation to his ex-girlfriends' boutique opening. Meanwhile, Gretchen wants to spend more time at Alan's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lan Mao Shi Zai Wuding Shang
programme.desc: Walden reconnects with Kate and is sure she's 'the one' that is, until he meets Vivian and becomes convinced she's 'the one.' Meanwhile, Alan and Gretchen grow closer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Principal Gallagher's Lesbian Lover
programme.desc: When Alan is called to meet with the school principal over a picture Jake drew of a large-breasted schoolmate, he calls Charlie to watch over Jake. When Charlie doesn't respond, Alan accuses him of 'not being there for him,' and Charlie relents.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Carpet Burns and a Bite Mark
programme.desc: Charlie organizes an intervention in order to keep Alan from reuniting with his ex-wife, Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: We Called It Mr. Pinky
programme.desc: A bout of impotence causes Charlie to re-examine his feelings toward women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell

programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Evading Capture Part 1

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Life in a Cage

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight
programme.desc: Tia is called in to help rescue five injured dogs from a dog fighting situation. Parolee Spencer gets out of jail and returns to Villalobos. Tia asks Spencer to help out with an adoption to keep him on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down, Not Out
programme.desc: After Tia suffers a devastating injury, her kids have to step up to keep Villalobos running. Everyone's help is needed to catch an elusive dog in the middle of the night. And, a family of 8 needs a new companion to complete their active home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Life in a Cage

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blind Hope
programme.desc: When a blind pit bull is attacked by other dogs, the Villalobos team steps-in and takes responsibility for his recovery. Also, a couple from Pittsburgh mourning the loss of their pit bull visits Villalobos and fall in love with one of Tia's favorite dogs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon

programme.title: Disney Channel Special: Disney Hall of Villains
Raven's Home: Don't Trust the G in Apartment 4B
programme.desc: Now that they are high school students, Booker and Nia feel they are too old for trick-or-treating. They instead convince Levi, Tess and Ramon to join them for a night of real scares and fun in 4B, the apartment that is suspected to be haunted.

programme.title: Jessie: The Whining
programme.desc: The Ross kids become concerned that history is repeating itself after a scary old doorman tells them a building legend about a nanny who did 'something terrible' to the kids in her care on Halloween. Jessie and Tony work together to crash a party.

programme.title: Jessie: Ghost Bummers
programme.desc: Jessie and the kids throw a Halloween party because Mrs. Chesterfield doesn't invite them to the building's party. During the party, actual ghosts/demons wind up possessing Emma, Luke and Mrs. Chesterfield, leaving Jessie, Ravi and Zuri to save the day.

programme.title: Movie: Halloweentown
programme.desc: A girl, after learning she is a witch, must help her family save Halloweentown from evil.

programme.title: Jessie: Karate Kid-tastrophe
programme.desc: Emma rebels with loud music, adult clothes, and a bad attitude. She ends up getting suspended from school and running away. Jessie learns her whereabouts and manages to get Emma to open up about what's bugging her.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby
programme.desc: When Jessie goes back to college, her and Ravi end up sharing the same class. Zuri brings home a baby giraffe from Africa.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Repeat-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Rate-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Duets and Destiny

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie Comes a Callin'

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night

programme.title: Bluey: Ice Cream/ Bad Mood/ Double Babysitter

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo play The Quiet Game. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie.

programme.desc: Juleka becomes Reflekta again. But this time, the supervillain is not alone, and Marinette and Adrien are having trouble with their Miraculous.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Cheating Death
programme.desc: An elephant has a run-in with a carload of tourists. A lion shows his natural instincts can’t be tamed. A tiny Chihuahua takes on armed robbers. These unforgettable brushes with death remind us that everyday survival can be precarious.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Last Call
programme.desc: A traumatized man calls 911 after seeing his friend shot and killed right before his eyes. With a surprisingly long list of suspects, investigators must sort through layers of lies, jealousy, and mistrust, until they finally uncover the shooter.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Highway of Horrors
programme.desc: In 1992, a college student disappears after her car breaks down on the highway. Family and friends join police in a frantic search that hits one setback after another. It may take new advances in DNA technology to finally crack this stubborn case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2018, in the mountains of Colorado a young pilot goes missing without a trace, leaving behind her baby. Police follow the few clues they have and unravel a story far more bizarre and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Backyard Blood
programme.desc: A man's dream comes true when he buys his parents' house and moves his family into it, only to discover that his neighbor on the other side of the fence holds a decades-long grudge against him that won't resolve until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Best Lives Cut Short
programme.desc: When entrepreneur Ash Rowell's good life is cut short after he's gunned down, police suspect a hit. Suspicion falls on his own family members. Then, after a long night of partying, two friends' overdoses may turn out to be something more sinister.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: A Body at Devil's Corral
programme.desc: When police officer Rob and former beauty queen Joanna reunite years after high school, he seems to be her Prince Charming. But money troubles and infidelities bring this fairytale to a tragic end when one of them is found dead at Devil's Corral.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Opposites Can Kill
programme.desc: Young single mom Kathy wants a good life for herself and her son. That life soon includes wannabe rap star Juan, who has ambitions of his own. But their dreams clash and tempers erupt when Kathy decides she wants more out of life: no matter what the cost.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic roast chicken episode with new flavours, new science and a strange new twist on 'broiling'.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload
programme.desc: A lot has happened in the world of coffee since this show dropped in 2000; since then, Alton Brownhas brewed (and consumed) a lot of coffee. Here's his new look at roasting, grinding, brewing and thegear you need to do it.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Brown

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Greenville Goodness
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Jacksonville, Fla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks off his culinary escapades with a chef-driven dish of chorizo corn cakes with vegan queso and spicy guajillo chile sauce.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Las Vegas

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puglia
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Puglia, a coastal region in the heel of Italy's boot. The area's simple but stunning dishes include orecchiette pasta, grilled octopus and stuffed pasticiotti pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Fez
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Fez, the cultural and spiritual capital of Morocco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.

programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger and Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas, making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Whistlin' Susie
programme.desc: After activating an atomic bomb in the 'Man Cave,' Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save the city that they protect.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Trickening!
programme.desc: The kids forego their usual trick-or-treat path and instead take on the most haunted house in Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!
Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.desc: It's time for playgroup, and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up. In the group, there are nurses, police officers, and even pirates, but it takes Peppa a little longer to figure out what she wants to be.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Nursery Rhymes/ Digger World
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes. Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to Digger World, where they build walls and knock them over again. Peppa takes Teddy to Miss Rabbit's Doll Hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Children's Festival/Muddy Festival/World Book Day/Roman Day/Foggy Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the children's festival. Peppa wakes up to find the festival covered in mud. It's World Book Day at playgroup. Peppa has fun dressing up as Romans. Peppa and her family get lost in the fog.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Sir Blaze and the Unicorn
programme.desc: Sir Blaze and Sir AJ try to save a unicorn from an unpoppable bubble.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Blazing Amazing Stories
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are babysitting for Baby Gherkin. When it's time for her nap, they tell her three epic bedtime stories about police, cowboys, and superheroes - all starring Blaze and his friends.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Wild Safari Playdate/ Ryan's Goal Scoring Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan and his family pounce and claw through puzzles and challenges; Ryan shoots for the ultimate goal of having an awesome playdate.

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas: The Silver Lasso/ The Sea Dragon's Treasure
programme.desc: Following the adventures of a caring and brave pirate named Santiago Montes.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Hide and Seek With Blue
programme.desc: Josh, Blue, and all our friends are playing Hide and Seek, and Blue knows the BEST hiding spot! As we play Blue's Clues to figure out the best place to hide, we search for our hiding friends and play Snail and Seek with Magenta and Blue.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Race Around the Earth
programme.desc: In their biggest race ever, Blaze and AJ go head-to-head against Crusher to race all the way around the Earth and win the World's Biggest Trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
programme.desc: The three super baddies take the Mighty Pups' meteor. They must get it back and Charge Up to stop them before the team of baddies destroys Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise/ Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
programme.desc: Rocky and the Pups are fixing an Old-Timey Junk Car for Ace Sorensen's Birthday. Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Gold Rush/ Pups Save the Paw Patroller
programme.desc: A grizzled old prospector arrives in Adventure Bay. Later, Mayor Humdinger decides he needs a new TV - the one in the Paw Patroller.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Bat Family/ Pups Save a Mud Monster
programme.desc: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them. Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab for 15 minutes. SpongeBob triple-books his schedule, and does his best to be at all three events at the same time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick shrink and travel inside Squidward's body; Patrick thinks that he must get out of town.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Black smoke billowing above the Fraser Valley sends fire crews and Ken Duperon racing to the Mission Towing yard. A cracked trailer in deep snow becomes a delicate recovery for Rick and Brandon.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Close Calls
programme.desc: Cam narrowly escapes a deadly crash when his 50-ton wrecker is struck from behind. Jamie and Greg climb into the backcountry to rescue an articulating rock truck clinging to a mountain slope.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: The Bait
programme.desc: Jamie attempts to lure back former lead operator Colin McLean by ordering his dream truck. Team Reliable tackles a smashed semi with a super-sized load of French fries. A blown tire launches a dump truck into the ditch and two teams into action.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: That's Teamwork
programme.desc: Steve's crew fights to free an extremely long load from a tightly curved ramp. Gary's new team – and his hopes for the future – are put to the test against a heavy sea container.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage: Emergency!
programme.desc: Responding to an emergency call, Northstar marine sets out to salvage a tug sunk in the Delaware Bay. Following the devastation caused by hurricane Sally captain Chris Ward and his crew work to salvage a sunken sailboats and wrecked powerboats.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Bloody Valentine
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day 2001, socialite Susan Hamilton laid nude, smashed in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida was gripped with terror as co-eds were murdered in gory killings.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Dead Man's Hollow
programme.desc: State of the art forensics, dogged police work, and some extraordinary turns of events lead police to a gruesome murder scene, the medical room of a ball bearings factory.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Vanished
programme.desc: Police scramble to find the owner of a private school for Asians after he vanishes.

programme.title: Intervention: Shandon
programme.desc: After her parents divorced, Shandon was bullied and she turned to drugs to cope. Now in her mid-twenties and saddled with a $200 a day intravenous habit, she prostitutes herself in order to feed her addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Jade
programme.desc: At 24, Jade has a severe addiction to prescription opioids and cocaine and suffers from intense suicidal ideations.

programme.title: Intervention: Bryceton
programme.desc: A talented singer-songwriter, Bryceton's addiction to alcohol and synthetic marijuana is completely out of control. His wife struggle to raise their son while coping with Bryceton's erratic behaviour. Any offers of help are met with outbursts and anger.

programme.title: Intervention: David S
programme.desc: David struggled not only with being compared to his athletic family, but also with his own sexuality. Acting out turned to alcoholism and meth addiction, and it wasn't long before David found himself dumpster diving and sleeping behind stores.

programme.title: Intervention: Kristie
programme.desc: Kristie's dreams of being a museum curator were dashes after OCD and anxiety caused her to drop out of school and self-medicate with alcohol. Her addiction spiraled out of control and now includes a large mix or drugs and huffing following her divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Randy/ Vicki
programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: GaTa
programme.desc: GaTa tasks the three chefs with recreating Domino's Hawaiian Pizza.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: Find out which bizarre character wound up on the IJ cruise, which Joker once had to put a stranger's hand in his mouth, and which challenge was filmed in a basement. Plus, learn what punishment almost involved pantsing a CEO.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Closer
programme.desc: Learn which challenges Murr's considers his favorite, who has an impressive sneaker collection and why the crew was on high alert during this punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Backyard Cookout Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a late-summer cookout featuring the real star of the Impractical Jokers Movie: Paula Abdul.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: All Flubbed Up
programme.desc: Watch a woman with seemingly magical powers disrupt an ordinary coffee shop.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Fools
programme.desc: Learn why playing with fire is still a bad idea, see who has the fastest Rubik's Cube hands underwater, and the latest on the dad bod craze that's taking over the world.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Pranks and Funny Fails
programme.desc: Find out what happens when you get caught in a no-selfie zone, why mailing humans is the way of the future, and how cuddling is an art form of its own.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cars
programme.desc: Adam dives into the much-beloved auto industry and exposes the surprising truths behind car dealerships, and the fact that the concept of jaywalking was created by auto manufacturers to blame pedestrians for car crashes.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Restaurants
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the hidden truths of dining out. He explains why tipping is a custom worth ditching, shows that experts can't tell the difference between wines and reveals that mislabeled seafood is rampant in the industry.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Just Made History
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers' market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then, things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape-shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Michael stretches headphone cords and reality with a mystical putty, stuns a co-worker with new bathroom technology, and in the big finale, a Porta Potty becomes a Portal Potty, leaving a construction worker amazed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Albino Corn Snake Viper Patrol
programme.desc: Working at a tattoo parlor, Michael gets some killer ink in a flash. Later, a serpent ambushes a routine car checkup and one unlucky guy learns a lesson in shrinkage down on the docks.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 6
programme.desc: A guy with a rogue beer slingshot, a grown man losing a battle with a piñata, and Filipino friends freaking out over Miss Universe.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 13
programme.desc: Watch 20 of the wildest, most pointless brawls every captured on film. You'll see a vicious slap fight, a seriously low blow, and some amazing girl on girl on girl action.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 23
programme.desc: Subjects include a woman who dials 911 with an urgent request for a husband and a robber who wraps his face in toilet paper but leaves behind prescription drugs with his name on the bottle.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 24

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: When Rob and Chyna get into an explosive fight, the girls rally behind them with hopes that they can fix their relationship. Meanwhile, the family tries to convince Khloé to break her streak of bad birthdays.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Cruisin'

programme.desc: Alan and Walden have a meeting with an adoption social worker that hinges on them being convincing as a loving couple. Meanwhile, Lyndsey returns after 60 days in rehab.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thirty-Eight, Sixty-Two, Thirty-Eight
programme.desc: Walden and Alan meet a birth mother who's considering them to adopt her baby.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oontz. Oontz. Oontz
programme.desc: Walden decides to foster a six-year-old boy but begins to doubt himself when they don't bond like he expected.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt

programme.desc: Dan's old girlfriend drops by for a lunch date. Roseanne imagines some romantic fantasies of her own with Fabio.

programme.title: Roseanne: Homecoming

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Lake Collision
programme.desc: Officer Bronson investigates a teen's social media post, boasting of illegally shooting a deer. Officer Canfield confronts a hunter over multiple violations. And, the dive team searches for a boat and its driver after a collision with another boat.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.desc: A shy Cavalier King Charles Spaniel is coaxed out of her shell by her peppy aunt.

programme.desc: A woman's cat is marking everything in her house. A couple's new cat is disturbing the peace.

programme.desc: Steve treks through steamy jungles and mist-shrouded valleys to an equatorial glacier.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventures of Porcupine Dating
programme.desc: Rhino Kifaru is attempting to mate, despite his arthritic knees; tapir Jenny falls ill, and widowed porcupine Roxy meets a new mate.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Towering Treetop Teahouse

programme.desc: The ATM crew provide their unfiltered comments on a Cleoptra inspired aquarium and a tank for the head quarters of Spencer's.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Standing Strong

programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Movie: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Movie: Drive Angry
programme.desc: A father escapes from hell to hunt down the man who killed his daughter and abducted his granddaughter.

programme.title: Home Town: A Second Chance
programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.title: Home Town: A Laurel Hug
programme.desc: A woman is moving back to Laurel to be close to family after the sudden passing of her husband. Ben and Erin thoughtfully bring their design to life and create a gorgeous, sun-filled home as a soft landing to help get her through this difficult time.

programme.title: Home Town: Grand Style
programme.desc: A woman moving back to Laurel after being away for years wants a place big enough to accommodate her parents, kids and grandkids if they visit all at once. Erin can't wait to deliver on her ideal design plan: blue and white in the French provincial style.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: First Hammer Swing
programme.desc: Ben and Erin begin revitalizing a small town by turning a foster couple's home into a welcoming space for kids. Dave and Jenny Marrs join in to help them tackle a boutique on the brink of closure, and a special guest surprises Wetumpka with a performance.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: Town or Country
programme.desc: David and Taneia own a number of rental properties in Laurel and need Ben and Erin's help to help them choose which one will meet their needs as they enter their empty nester phase.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Breaking Bland
programme.desc: A couple's beautiful Craftsman house in Chicago is so crammed with kids' toys they can barely move. After being too overwhelmed to even hang up art, Tiffany Brooks shows them how to break their style paralysis with three life-changing renovation options.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: First Hammer Swing
programme.desc: Ben and Erin begin revitalizing a small town by turning a foster couple's home into a welcoming space for kids. Dave and Jenny Marrs join in to help them tackle a boutique on the brink of closure, and a special guest surprises Wetumpka with a performance.

programme.desc: David and Taneia own a number of rental properties in Laurel and need Ben and Erin's help to help them choose which one will meet their needs as they enter their empty nester phase.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Breaking Bland
programme.desc: A couple's beautiful Craftsman house in Chicago is so crammed with kids' toys they can barely move. After being too overwhelmed to even hang up art, Tiffany Brooks shows them how to break their style paralysis with three life-changing renovation options.

programme.title: Home Town: Banquette Dreams
programme.desc: Virginia newlyweds look for a new place to call home in Mississippi. They have an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a banquette, a master bedroom and a spacious front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: The Toilet Is Still in the Hallway
programme.desc: Armed with some previous construction experience, a man convinced his partner he could tackle their remodeling projects. Three months later, however, the work is not complete. Jasmine rescues them by finishing their bathroom and updating their kitchen.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Behind the Tarp
programme.desc: A handyman set out to give his wife the luxurious bathroom she has always wanted. However, now they are in over their heads and living in a construction zone.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Time to Hand It Over to the Pros
programme.desc: A couple with demanding jobs took on projects around their home, but now they have no time to finish all the work. Jasmine finishes their floors, updates their kitchen and tackles their backyard to create spaces where they can reconnect after a long day.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Four Weeks Until Baby
programme.desc: A couple's renovation dreams were dashed when they were forced to spend their budget on mold issues after moving. Now they have a baby on the way, and Jasmine has four weeks to renovate their kitchen, dining room and give them a much-needed nursery.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: I Don't Want to be Project Manager Anymore
programme.desc: A couple set out to create their dream home, but their skill level ran out and they have a million projects they can't finish. Jasmine steps in to turn their half-finished kitchen, bathroom and backyard into spaces where the family can relax and connect.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Can You Believe I'm Living Here?
programme.desc: After taking a huge chunk off their 1960s fixer upper, a couple is living with a gutted living room and kitchen with no plans on how to fix the demolition. Jasmine works with their dwindling budget to create a stunning beach house retreat.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Two-Bedroom Dilemma
