programme.title: Pawn Stars: Huddle Up
programme.desc: A 1966 Miami Dolphins playbook rushes into the shop, and a vintage cash register is found.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn With the Wind
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars see dollar signs when a one-dollar bill signed by Clark Gable comes into the shop. An early 1900s Shoeless Joe Jackson "Black Betsy" baseball bat is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: A book signed by Charles Lindbergh flies into focus for the Pawn Stars, while a medal issued by Germany torpedoes into the shop. A guy tries to throw Rick off balance with a rare 17th-century money scale.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bang Bang

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Apocalypse
programme.desc: A pair of vintage Aerosmith tour shirts jam into the shop. Then, Rick and Corey check out a U.S. Navy foghorn. Later, Corey braces himself for the apocalypse when he checks out a state-of-the-art survival vehicle, built to fight zombies.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Birthday Blues

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Breaking the Bank

programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Movie: Lilo & Stitch

programme.title: Raven's Home: Bless This Tess

programme.title: The Nile: Paradise Found

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Possessed by an Alien
programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Legend of Machu Picchu
programme.desc: Machu Picchu is one of the greatest landmarks of world architecture, yet the purpose of its construction and how it was built still remains a mystery; experts use cutting-edge engineering to reveal what it would take to rebuild this legendary city.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Legend of Machu Picchu

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Heist!
programme.desc: International hackers, an aviation-savvy hijacker and a gang of bank-robbing granddads mount some of the world's most daring and ingenious heists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: In Scottsdale, Arizona, single mom Tammy Lovell pays the ultimate price after she forces her boyfriend to confess to police his role in an insurance fraud scheme. Little does she realize; this good deed will soon cause her family's destruction.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Clearing the Docket
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Clearing the Docket
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Officer Down
programme.desc: A beloved detective is killed during a shootout in at a downtown Atlanta hotel. His fellow officers, and his own son, work hard to bring the shooters to justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Some Like It Dead
programme.desc: When Mirinda marries Sam, everyone is happy. She's pretty, he's cute and friendly. Until her spending veers out of control, tearing the couple apart. As the two fight it out, one of them looks outside the marriage - and finds nothing short of murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Shattered: Mother's Little Helpers
programme.desc: 2001. A son's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children, and a mother struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Heartland Massacre
programme.desc: In the heart of America's devastating Farm Crisis, the largest mass murder in recent Missouri history stuns a small town. An entire family is wiped out. The unlikely suspect is a 14-year-old boy… but the real extent of the horror is even more shocking.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Road Rage
programme.desc: When Ray and Marie Thornton head out for a drive in the country on Easter Sunday, they are nearly chased off the road by a tailgating van. When the Thornton's spot the van's driver changing license plates and dumping a bloody sheet, they call police.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.desc: The Jacksons need four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Modern Cabin Makeover
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fruity Favorites
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples some berry delicious fairground treats in this fruitful episode. Tart, sweet and perfect with breakfast, lunch or dinner, fruit makes everything pop. No forbidden fruits here, just some truly inventive fruit-filled creations.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Sweet 'n' Savory Sensations
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the fairgrounds to sample midway munchies that satisfy every taste bud, from sweet to savory. From a bratwurst topped with sauerkraut and apple pie to garlic enhanced doughnuts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: North Dakota State Fair/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: In North Dakota, host Noah Cappe chows down on Wild Rice Burgers, Idaho Tacos and Kettle Corn, which make up the regional fare in this western state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Go Nuts for Donuts
programme.desc: Celebrating the best donuts carnivals have to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: We Deep Fried That!
programme.desc: Celebrating the best carnival deep fried treats!

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: New Recruits
programme.desc: Void Knight’s new general, Boomtower, tries to steal a mysterious Orb from the city museum. When the Rangers struggle to stop him, they get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Meathead Justice/ Bwar-Mart
programme.desc: After Kick saves the DiPazzi twins' lives, they become indebted to him by their code of ethics. When they do not leave his side, he must go to extreme measures to get them out of his life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's a Riot
programme.desc: Rock out with the Pawn Stars when a 1969 Gibson Les Paul jams into the shop. Then, Chum tries to score with a Los Angeles Lakers backpack signed by members of the 2004 team. Later, Corey calls Rick out on his most annoying habit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum System
programme.desc: A nightstick thought to have belonged to Ulysses S. Grant arrives at the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a vintage skateboard sticker collection. Chumlee tries to prove he is a master at multitasking.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Crude and Uncalled For
programme.desc: After Alan ends up in jail after getting into a bar fight, Charlie worries that Chelsea has a thing for the lawyer hired to help Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aye, Aye Captain Douche
programme.desc: Charlie's jealousy threatens his relationship with Chelsea.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chummified
programme.desc: A mummified falcon and an autographed Harlem Globetrotter's basketball from 1978 arrive at the shop. The Old Man and Chumlee borrow a metal detector that came in overnight to go treasure hunting, against Rick's wishes.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Joke
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over a joke that Ross successfully submitted to Playboy.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel insists on throwing a farewell party for Emily just so she can invite Joshua.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Free Porn
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey get the adult channel for free and are afraid to turn off the TV.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Rachel prepares for an evening with Joshua, but plans go awry; Emily plays tour guide.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Haste
programme.desc: Ross considers asking Emily to move in with him to keep her from returning to London.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Fart Jokes, Pie and Celeste
programme.desc: Jake writes love songs to woo his ex-girlfriend and Herb and Alan hide their secret friendship from Judith's watchful eye.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Yay, No Polyps
programme.desc: Charlie endures a colonscopy to get out of a trip to see Chelsea's bigoted parents, only to return home and find them in his living room.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Wish We Had Better News
programme.desc: A TV reporter breaks wind on live television, a skier decides to hit the ski lodge, at 30mph, and later, a man accidentally parks his motorcycle in deep end of the pool.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It Just Goes to Snow Ya
programme.desc: A weather reporter catches a winter bug by inhaling a fly, a guy shoveling snow off a roof discovers the meaning of slippery slope, and a woman wakes up to a foot and a half of snow inside her car.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Seattle/ Tacoma City Finals
programme.desc: 'American Ninja Warrior' heads back to the Pacific North West for the City Finals round of the competition at the Tacoma Dome.

programme.title: Wipeout: Winter Wipeout: Some People Just Don't Know When to Quit
programme.desc: Featuring 'Snowman Surprise,' including 'Booty Pop' who butts in on the Yule Log Jam and a dolphin impressionist who chatters on about the Big Balls, all while a 'Studly Student' and 'Pretty Piggy' run for their lives on the 'Polar Bear Express.'

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Debbie Weisman
programme.desc: The hosts welcome Debbie Weisman.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Best Shocker Pranks!
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Best Stunt Pranks!
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: In Conclusion, Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Beverly insists the entire family gather for the holiday, but tension builds when brother-in-law Marvin tricks Pop-Pop into thinking Thanksgiving was at his house. Meanwhile, Pops passes the torch to Barry and Erica to give the holiday toast.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Wingmom
programme.desc: Inspired by 'Top Gun,' Barry decides to join ROTC. Convinced it will help discipline him, Murray orders the Captain to prevent Barry from quitting when the going gets tough, prompting Beverly to join Barry, too.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Bitter Man and the Sea
programme.desc: Mike is forced to uninvite Carl to his anniversary cruise after Carl's nasty break-up with Victoria.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cops on the Rocks
programme.desc: Mike and Carl go to couples counselling to try and reconcile their partnership. Also, Molly decides to do a promotional radio interview on her own after Peggy decides not to participate.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Moon Over Kenya
programme.desc: When a rising young star on the pro fishing circuit has dinner at the Baxters' and the conversation turns to travelling the world for work, Vanessa wonders if Mike is feeling tied down now that he spends more time at home.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Tree of Strife
programme.desc: When an overzealous Mandy gets the chance to meet her idol, Kim Kardashian, things don't go exactly as planned, but the outcome is better than she could have ever imagined. Mike doesn't want 'The Man' ordering him to cut down a damaged tree.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen
programme.desc: Dre must take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school and hatches a plan for them to escape to a fancy hotel for some pampering.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Ground Control to Sara Lance
programme.desc: Rory and Behrad follow a lead on who can help them find Sara, who's been taken by Aliens, while Constantine tries to work his magic. Sara does all she can to try to escape but is shocked to learn who one of her kidnappers is.

programme.title: Batwoman: Initiate Self-Destruct
programme.desc: A decision could expose Ryan as Batwoman. Black Mask's plans for Kate Kane begin to unfold. Alice is reunited with someone from her past, and Sophie must decide where her loyalty lies.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Little Kicks
programme.desc: Jerry is forced into doing an illegal activity; George cultivates a bad boy image.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Package
programme.desc: Kramer tries to scam the United States Postal Service to get Jerry a refund for a stereo.

programme.title: Mom: Broken Dreams and Blocked Arteries
programme.desc: Christy is caught in the middle when tensions rise between Bonnie and Alvin. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Violet is apprehensive about going to her senior prom.

programme.title: Mom: Smokey Taylor and a Deathbed Confession
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Violet through labour. Meanwhile, Christy is convinced that Bonnie still has feelings for Alvin.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sax Problem
programme.desc: When Earl is not invited to play with his old jazz band at their reunion show, Max and the diner gang join forces in order to get him back on stage.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the No New Friends
programme.desc: When Max reconnects with an old friend, Caroline's jealousy inspires her to try to make some new friends of her own.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Girl Who Cried Wolf
programme.desc: The shoe is on the other foot when inexplicable things put Sharona's sanity to the test.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Ed Helms and Patti Harrison, Ruby Rose, David Alan Grier, Alexander Skarsgard, Sara Waisglass and Felix Mallard, Nick Jonas, Vargus Mason, Bobby Cannavale, Colin Farrell, Kristen Wiig and Sofia Carson.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Driveway Wash/ Where There's a Will There's a Way
programme.desc: Woman sues contractor over driveway; niece sues aunt for loan for funeral expenses.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Discipline Your Kids in My Restaurant/ Bad Gymnastic Coach
programme.desc: Bad online review affects eatery's business; gymnastic coach gives inappropriate advice.

programme.title: Protection Court: Frightened by Her Deception/ Just Moved Back
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Sisters at War/ 1, 2, 3 and Sold
programme.desc: Sister sues over damaged property; woman sues storage facility over property loss.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Gaytz vs. Rembold
programme.desc: An Indiana woman is in court because she made a death bed promise to her son that she would find out if he fathered his girlfriend's two children.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jennings vs. Lynn
programme.desc: Years ago, a young Georgia woman got pregnant so that she and her then boyfriend could legally marry, but now 28 years later she's in court to find out if her ex-husband or one of her lovers is her daughter's biological father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Mariza wants Lena to pay for property she damaged and stole, but Lena says Mariza and her other tenants are responsible for the damage, and that her stolen items were misplaced.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for damaged property and lost wages, but he says while he was incarcerated, she was cheating on him, even after her assurances she was being faithful.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Terrible Tub ' and 'Not Tightening Things Up.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Letting a Guy Down ' and 'That's Just Bad Business.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Lights Out/ Sounds Fine
programme.desc: Dispute occur over lighting for a dance competition and a faulty alarm system.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Shawn wants a refund from Jeremy of S&S Moving Prof LLC because for a botched job and damage to her furniture so she is suing for $5,000. Jeremy contends that his company satisfied their end of the agreement and owes Shawn nothing!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Boyfriend Sexually Assault My Sister That Night?
programme.desc: Three weeks ago, Chanard got a hotel room to party with his on-again-off-again girlfriend, Sheridan, and her sister, Aliyah. However the next day when the sisters returned home, Aliyah had a disturbing story to tell Sheridan.

programme.title: Maury: I Saw a Selfie of You in a Woman's Bed ... Did You Cheat?
programme.desc: Demetra thought she found 'the one' in Melvin, but she now believes he is living a secret sex life with strippers and prostitutes. The fate of a relationship hangs in the balance of a lie detector test.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sex Debt Collector
programme.desc: Zaee wants to make amends with her friend YaYa but YaYa reveals she hooked up with Zaee's boyfriend Jeremy. Hillary is after money Lawrence owes her for selling her photos online. Mike asks forgiveness from Cassie for hooking up with her roommate Jade.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove Your Boyfriend Got My Teen Pregnant!
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Vanessa want to prove that Cheyenne's ex Demarquez is the father of her baby. Lizzie wants to prove her ex Curtis is the father of her son. Drea says Josh is the father of her baby, but Josh says she's after him because he owns a lot of land.
